free_text: Investigation of spallation reactions on 120Sn and
Data for Sn-120(p,x) reactions at 0.66 GeV/nucl.
High Energies at the JINR, Dubna.
Metallic foils, three layers of them for 118,120,124Sn
The values quoted in tables 2 and 3 as the
errors in the respective quantities were obtained as
the largest deviation of the results of various
measurements from the averaged cross section value.
Errors include statistical uncertainties in determining
the detector efficiencies, the numbers of particles in
a beam and the number of nuclei in a target.
